flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Palm Beach Atlantic University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.1k → $40.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Palm Beach Atlantic University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.1k → $40.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Palm Beach Atlantic University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Palm Beach Atlantic University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3k → 2.6k).
